content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad rally with Pharma +2.79%, Bank Nifty +0.85%, Auto +0.92%, Metal +1.26% all participating; VIX cooling -3% to 17.38. US markets strong overnight (Nasdaq +1.03%). Existing book is well-positioned across defence, ports, HFC, chemicals — focus this tick is locking gains via SL trails, not adding new clusters since deployed is 54% with 11 names already.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23997,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +6.4%, well above +4% trail trigger. CMP 1048.90, max(entry 984, 0.98*1048.90=1027.92) = 1027.92, but pivot S1 1035.43 is a more natural structural level. Trailing SL from 1032 → 1035 locks in +5.2% with ~1.3% gap below CMP (within 1% floor relaxed slightly given strong intraday support). Thesis intact post Q4 (PAT +19%, GNPA 0.93%); let it run to 1110."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1718.00,
      "new_target": 1800.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +2.6%, just past breakeven trail trigger. Day low 1718.60, CMP 1742. Tightening SL from 1715 → 1718 locks in small gain with ~1.4% gap below CMP. Thesis intact (ATH yesterday, JPM OW, Q4 +26% rev). Target 1800 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.0%, below +2% trigger. Current SL 4570 is just 1.1% below CMP 4619.80 — already tight. Board meeting May 14 (6 sessions) is the binary — within 3-session window after next 3 days; will reassess Friday. For now hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6970.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +2.3%, above +2% trigger. Stored SL 6960 already at breakeven+. Tighten slightly to 6970 (still ~1.0% below CMP 7041.50, respects trail-gap floor). Q4 PAT +124%, FY26 +103% EBITDA, Geojit target 8500. Strong momentum into 52w high zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.9%, recovering today +1.3%. SL 119 is 4% below CMP — appropriate for ETF defensive hold. Gold tailwind intact. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.7%, SL at entry 838. CMP 850.10 — gap 1.4% below CMP, healthy. Q4 board meeting in May (binary). Hold; will trail if it pushes above 860."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.6%, SL 362 is 1.3% below CMP — room to work. Q4 strong (PAT +30%, ROA 2.07%, MOSL TP 325 raised). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.2%, faded from intraday +5%. SL 818 is 0.5% below CMP 822 — already tight. Result-day fade post Q4 (street expected more); FMCG defensive bid intact. Hold to see if it stabilizes; if it cracks 818 we exit clean."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +1.1%, SL 1265 is 0.6% below CMP 1276.50 — already tight. Q4 PAT optics flattered by tax benefit, dividend deferred, Q1FY27 guided flat. Tight SL is correct posture. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L +0.1%, SL 2980 is 1.6% below CMP 3037.70. Stock +48% in April — extended. Defence basket move sustaining today. Hold; not ready to trail given thin gain."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "P&L -0.3%, recovered from -1%+ earlier. SL 790 is 1.6% below CMP. Q4 record revenue, 46.5% EBITDA margin, +9.84% intraday — positive setup. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1035.00, "reasoning": "Lock in +5.2% gain at S1 pivot, 1.3% gap below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "ADANIPORTS", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1718.00, "reasoning": "Just above day low; protects breakeven+ on a +2.6% winner."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 6970.00, "reasoning": "Marginal trail to lock breakeven+ while respecting 1% gap-below-CMP floor."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven; gain too thin to tighten further. May 14 board meeting reassessment due Friday."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive ETF; SL 119 appropriate."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL at entry; small gain, give it room."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL appropriately placed; thesis intact post-Q4."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already 0.5% below CMP — tightening further would self-stopout."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL already tight at 0.6% below CMP."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Thin gain; SL has 1.6% buffer, adequate."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Below entry but recovering; SL 790 has room."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Pharma momentum (AJANTPHARM, NEULANDLAB, AUROPHARMA) is genuine but I already have NAVINFLUOR (chemicals adjacent) and 11 names on book. Adding more would push deployed past 70% and stack pharma cluster. NEULANDLAB has May 12 binary (5 sessions) — disqualified for new entry by binary-event rule. M&M and AJANTPHARM are post-result momentum but I'd want a pullback entry, not chase intraday highs at 14:11. COFORGE already held — no add. HFCL pending order placed earlier still OPEN at 133.50 — leaving it; if it doesn't fill by 14:30 will cancel. VEDL post-demerger volatility too messy for clean R:R.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 54% deployed across 11 names — adequate breadth, no need to force new entries with 78 minutes left. Three positions trailed (PNBHOUSING, ADANIPORTS, NAVINFLUOR) protect ~₹7,500 of unrealized gains. HAL board meeting May 14 is the next binary to manage — will decide trim/exit by Friday's tick. 5-day P&L is -608 so capital preservation discipline is correct here, not new-entry aggression. Watching whether HFCL pending order fills; if not, will cancel next tick."
}
